site.name: Creami Recipes
site.description: Discover and share delicious Ninja Creami recipes with step-by-step guidance and pro tips.

home.heroDescription: Discover tested recipes, follow step-by-step guidance with pro tips, and share your own frozen creations with the Ninja Creami community.
home.featuredDescription: Top-rated frozen treats from our community, tested and loved.
home.howItWorksDescription: From freezer to first scoop, every recipe guides you through each step.
home.chooseRecipeDesc: Browse by flavor, difficulty, or Creami model. Every recipe includes ratings from the community.
home.followStepsDesc: Step-by-step guidance with pro tips and hints. Use Cook Mode for hands-free, one-step-at-a-time view.
home.rateShareDesc: Rate recipes, leave reviews, and submit your own creations for the community to enjoy.
home.ctaDescription: Join our community of Creami enthusiasts and share your best frozen creations.
home.comingSoonDesc: We're churning up something delicious. Check back soon!

recipes.countLabel: {count} recipe{plural} and counting. Find your next frozen creation.
recipes.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.

recipe.signInToReview: Sign in to leave a review and help the community.

review.reviewBodyPlaceholder: Share details about your experience making this recipe...
review.noReviews: No reviews yet. Be the first to share your thoughts!

auth.signInDesc: Sign in to your account to continue.
auth.registerDesc: Create an account to submit recipes and leave reviews.

footer.disclaimer: Not affiliated with Ninja or SharkNinja.
